name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-95
title: rabbit-config skill base directory mismatch: script not found at .claude/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/
description:
When the rabbit-config skill is invoked, it reports base directory as '.claude/skills/rabbit-config/' but the actual script lives at '.claude/features/rabbit-cage/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py'. Any invocation that constructs the path from the reported base directory (e.g. 'python3 .claude/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py') fails with FileNotFoundError.

Reproduce: invoke rabbit-config skill, note reported base dir, attempt to run python3 .claude/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py — exits with 'No such file or directory'.

Actual script location confirmed by: find .claude -name rabbit-config.py => .claude/features/rabbit-cage/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py

Fix: either (a) create the expected symlink/directory at .claude/skills/rabbit-config/ pointing to the feature-owned location, or (b) ensure the skill's base directory declaration matches the actual file layout. The canonical path must be consistent so dispatcher code always finds the script without a search.
